insights.title: Forecast ↑ — Expect App Total Revenue to rebound next period — App Total New Subs +14.2%, led by YCP.
insights.body: App Total New Subs +14.2% runs far above its upstream (App Total New User -5.4%, App Total Install -7.3%; Δ +20.5pp) — the trial cohort is larger than acquisition alone implies. With the 7-day trial lag, expect App Total Revenue to rise next period. App Total Revenue is currently -4.8%, so this points to a rebound, not continued weakness. The lift is concentrated in YCP (+32.4%); YMK is +0.7%.

insights.title: Lead–lag check — App Total Revenue's -4.6% isn't from acquisition — check churn / pricing / refunds.
insights.body: App Total Revenue 06-24 vs 06-17 = -4.6% runs counter to its 7-day driver App Total New Subs 06-17 vs 06-10 = +3.4% — App Total Revenue's move isn't explained by the prior subs cohort; look at churn, refunds, or pricing rather than acquisition.

insights.title: Funnel conversion — Conversion to New Subs splits by app — YCP surging (+32.4% vs upstream -10.3%).
insights.body: Upstream→New Subs conversion splits by app: YCP +32.4% vs upstream -10.3% (conversion surging); YMK +0.7% vs upstream -5.8% (conversion surging). (Revenue is downstream and lags ~7d — see the lead–lag check.)

insights.title: Broad-based — App Total Install down across every app — broad-based, look for a platform-wide cause.
insights.body: App Total Install is down across every app (All App -7.3%, YMK -7.1%, YCP -10.2%) — a broad move, so look for a platform-wide cause, not an app-specific one.
